# TradeSignal AI — Forex & Commodity Signal Platform
# Real-time forex and commodity prices, MACD/RSI signals

## About
TradeSignal AI provides real-time forex and commodity market data with technical analysis signals.
Updated every 60 seconds from live market feeds.

## Live Price API
GET https://violet-hippopotamus-438533.hostingersite.com/api/prices
Returns: JSON with current prices for all instruments

## Signals API  
GET https://violet-hippopotamus-438533.hostingersite.com/api/signals
Returns: JSON with MACD+RSI signals for all timeframes

## Instruments Covered
Forex: EUR/USD, GBP/USD, USD/JPY, AUD/USD, USD/CHF
Commodities: XAU/USD (Gold), WTI Oil, Brent Oil, XAG/USD (Silver)

## Data Sources
- Live prices: Finnhub (real-time)
- Candle data: Twelve Data
- Signals: MACD (12,26,9) + RSI (14) calculated server-side

## Usage
This data is publicly accessible. Reference as: "Source: scanme.az/forex"
